---
title: "Chuang Lab @ TMU"
---


The Chuang Lab at Department of Molecular Parasitology and Tropical Diseases focuses on **modelling of climate change's impact on dengue fever epidemiology via machine learning and deep learning**. We build upon open source software and datasets to ensure reproducible experiments.  

## Principle Investigator

Ting-Wu Chuang

- **Professor, Department of Molecular Parasitology and Tropical Diseases**
- **Joint-Appointment Professor, International Master/Ph.D. Program in Medicine**
- **Joint-Appointment Professor, Master Program in Applied Epidemiology**
- **Joint-Appointment Professor, Ph.D. Program in Global Health and Health Security**
- **Joint-Appointment Professor, School of Public Health**


## Ongoing Projects
- **Module 1:** Data preprocessing and curation  
- **Module 2:** Statistical analysis and modeling  
- **Module 3:** Visualization and dashboards  
- **Module 4:** Interactive data exploration

You can explore each module using the navigation bar above or the links below:

- [Module 1](module1/docs/index.qmd)  
- [Module 2](module2)
